scope: Obama, Trump, and Biden promise records normalized for Promise Tracker ingestion
notes: This file is schema-aligned for promises, promise_actions, and promise_outcomes.
It does not include direct SQL inserts because president IDs and source IDs can differ by environment.
Use president_name to resolve president_id before import.
Create source rows first, then attach them through promise_sources, promise_action_sources, and promise_outcome_sources.

promise.title: Close Guantanamo Bay detention facility
promise.promise_text: As president, Barack Obama will close the detention facility at Guantanamo.
promise.impacted_group: Muslim detainees, civil-liberties advocates, and communities affected by post-9/11 detention policy
promise.summary: Obama moved early to close Guantanamo and reduced the detainee population, but the detention facility remained open at the end of his presidency.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact and official archival sources.

promise_actions.title: Obama orders Guantanamo closure review
promise_actions.description: Obama signed executive orders directing a review of detainee policy and setting a one-year goal for closing the detention facility.

promise_actions.title: Congress restricts funding for closure steps
promise_actions.description: Defense authorization language barred the use of funds for several closure pathways, limiting the administration's options.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The administration reduced the detainee population and repeatedly pursued closure, but Guantanamo remained open.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The prison population fell significantly, but the facility was not closed.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: This promise is not primarily Black-community-specific, but it remains relevant to civil-rights, detention-policy, and executive-power analysis.

source_references.source_title: Close the Guantanamo Bay Detention Center
Remarks by the President on Signing Executive Orders Closing the Guantanamo Detention Center

promise.title: End combat-brigade deployment in Iraq
promise.promise_text: Barack Obama will work with military commanders on the ground in Iraq and in consultation with the Iraqi government to end the war safely and responsibly within 16 months.
promise.impacted_group: U.S. military personnel, Iraqi civilians, and families affected by prolonged war
promise.summary: Obama ended the formal U.S. combat mission and drew down combat brigades, but U.S. military involvement in Iraq did not fully end over the longer term.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact and official archival sources.

promise_actions.title: Administration declares end of combat mission
promise_actions.description: Obama announced the end of the U.S. combat mission in Iraq and the transition to Operation New Dawn.

promise_actions.title: Obama announces full troop withdrawal timetable
promise_actions.description: The White House said all U.S. troops in Iraq would come home by the end of 2011.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Combat brigades were withdrawn and the formal combat mission ended, but the broader conflict and later U.S. re-engagement undercut the full promise frame.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Formal combat operations ended in 2010 and most troops withdrew by the end of 2011.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: This promise is not primarily Black-community-specific but remains relevant to military, foreign-policy, and executive-war-power records.

source_references.source_title: Begin removing combat brigades from Iraq
Remarks by the President on Ending the War in Iraq

promise.title: Repeal Don't Ask, Don't Tell
promise.promise_text: Repeal 'Don't Ask, Don't Tell' policy in the military.
promise.impacted_group: LGBTQ service members and military families
promise.summary: Obama signed the repeal of Don't Ask, Don't Tell, and the military later certified and implemented open service by gay and lesbian troops.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact, Congress, and news reporting.

promise_actions.title: Obama signs Don't Ask, Don't Tell repeal
promise_actions.description: Obama signed legislation repealing the law that barred openly gay and lesbian troops from military service.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The policy was repealed and openly gay and lesbian Americans were allowed to serve in the military.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Federal statute changed and military personnel policy shifted to allow open service.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: This promise is not centered on Black communities specifically but remains relevant to civil-rights and equal-treatment policy analysis.

source_references.source_title: Call for repeal of Don't Ask, Don't Tell policy
Don't Ask, Don't Tell Repeal Act of 2010
Obama signs 'Don't Ask, Don't Tell' repeal

promise.title: Ban pre-existing-condition exclusions
promise.promise_text: Require insurance companies to cover pre-existing conditions so all Americans, regardless of their health status or history, can get comprehensive benefits at fair and stable premiums.
promise.impacted_group: Patients with prior medical conditions and families dependent on individual and employer coverage
promise.summary: The Affordable Care Act barred insurers from denying or pricing coverage based on pre-existing conditions in major parts of the insurance market.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact subject coverage and federal law.

promise_actions.title: Affordable Care Act enacted
promise_actions.description: Obama signed the Affordable Care Act, including protections against pre-existing-condition exclusions.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Federal law established broad insurance protections for people with pre-existing medical conditions.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Insurers in ACA-regulated markets could no longer deny coverage or charge more because of pre-existing conditions.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: These protections affected Black households as part of broader health-equity access to insurance and treatment.

source_references.source_title: Promises about Health Care on the Obameter
Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act
Health Reform

promise.title: Enact a credit card bill of rights
promise.promise_text: The credit card bill of rights would ban unilateral changes, apply interest rate increases only to future debt, and prohibit interest on fees.
promise.impacted_group: Households using revolving credit, including low- and moderate-income borrowers
promise.summary: Obama signed the Credit CARD Act, which imposed tighter limits on a range of credit card pricing and billing practices.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact and federal law.

promise_actions.title: Credit CARD Act signed into law
promise_actions.description: Obama signed legislation restricting several credit card practices that had been central to his campaign proposal.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Federal law placed new limits on retroactive rate hikes and several abusive billing practices.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Card issuers faced new federal standards on disclosures, fees, and rate changes.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Consumer-credit protections matter for Black households because predatory lending and high-cost credit can deepen existing wealth gaps.

source_references.source_title: Establish a credit card bill of rights
Credit Card Accountability Responsibility and Disclosure Act

promise.title: Restore the ability to challenge pay discrimination
promise.promise_text: Obama pledged to support legislation overturning the Ledbetter pay-discrimination ruling.
promise.impacted_group: Workers facing long-running pay discrimination, especially women
promise.summary: Obama backed and signed the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act, making it easier to challenge ongoing pay discrimination.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from federal law and archival White House material.

promise_actions.title: Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act signed
promise_actions.description: Obama signed the first bill of his presidency, restoring workers' ability to challenge discriminatory pay over time.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Workers gained a renewed ability to file claims based on each discriminatory paycheck rather than only the original pay decision.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The statutory filing period was reset with each discriminatory paycheck.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: The law is relevant to Black women and other workers who face compounded wage discrimination.

source_references.source_title: Obameter
Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act of 2009
President Obama signs Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Restoration Act

promise.title: Enact a worker tax credit
promise.promise_text: Enact a Making Work Pay tax credit that would equal 6.2 percent of up to $8,100 of earnings, yielding a maximum credit of approximately $500.
promise.impacted_group: Workers and households affected by the recession
promise.summary: Obama enacted worker tax relief, but the ultimate delivery was more temporary and politically altered than the original campaign framing.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact and stimulus legislation.

promise_actions.title: Stimulus law includes Making Work Pay credit
promise_actions.description: The American Recovery and Reinvestment Act included the Making Work Pay tax credit.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Workers received federal tax relief, but the policy was time-limited and later replaced by other tax-cut mechanisms.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: A broad worker tax credit was enacted in the recovery package, though not as a permanent credit.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Worker tax relief affected Black households as part of broader recession-response policy, though it was not a targeted racial-equity measure.

source_references.source_title: Create a tax credit of $500 for workers
American Recovery and Reinvestment Act of 2009

promise.title: Expand children's health insurance coverage
promise.promise_text: Obama pledged to expand eligibility for Medicaid and SCHIP.
promise.impacted_group: Children in low- and moderate-income households
promise.summary: Obama signed CHIP expansion legislation early in his presidency, broadening coverage for children.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from federal law and PolitiFact health-care coverage.

promise_actions.title: CHIP expansion signed into law
promise_actions.description: Obama signed legislation reauthorizing and expanding the Children's Health Insurance Program.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Federal children's health coverage was expanded through reauthorization and program growth.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Eligibility and funding were expanded for children's coverage.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Expanded children's coverage affected Black families as part of broader health-access policy.

source_references.source_title: Promises about Health Care on the Obameter
Children's Health Insurance Program Reauthorization Act of 2009

promise.title: Ease federal restrictions on embryonic stem cell research
promise.promise_text: Obama pledged to remove barriers to responsible stem cell research.
promise.impacted_group: Researchers, patients, and families seeking broader medical research options
promise.summary: Obama reversed Bush-era limits on federally supported embryonic stem cell research through executive action.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from White House archival sources and PolitiFact tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: Obama removes barriers to stem cell research
promise_actions.description: Obama signed an executive order reversing prior limits on federally funded embryonic stem cell research.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Federal policy was changed to allow broader support for embryonic stem cell research subject to legal and ethical rules.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Federal research policy opened additional avenues for eligible stem cell research.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: This promise is not specifically Black-community-targeted, but it sits within broader science and health policy.

source_references.source_title: Obameter
Removing Barriers to Responsible Scientific Research Involving Human Stem Cells

promise.title: Roll back Bush tax cuts for upper-income households
promise.promise_text: Repeal the Bush tax cuts for those making more than $250,000 as couples or $200,000 as single filers.
promise.impacted_group: Upper-income taxpayers and the broader federal tax base
promise.summary: Higher rates were restored for top earners, but the result came through a broader fiscal-cliff compromise rather than the original clean repeal framing.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from tax-issue PolitiFact coverage and fiscal-cliff legislation.

promise_actions.title: Fiscal-cliff deal raises top tax rates
promise_actions.description: Congress passed and Obama signed legislation that raised rates for upper-income households while extending lower-bracket tax cuts.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Top-end Bush tax cuts were partially rolled back, but the final result came as a negotiated compromise.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Federal tax rates increased for upper-income households while many other tax cuts remained in place.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: The promise is not specifically Black-community-focused but is relevant to fiscal capacity and federal redistribution debates.

source_references.source_title: Promises about Taxes on the Obameter
American Taxpayer Relief Act of 2012

promise.title: Withdraw the United States from TPP
promise.promise_text: I will issue our notification of intent to withdraw from the Trans-Pacific Partnership, a potential disaster for our country.
promise.impacted_group: Workers and firms affected by trade policy
promise.summary: Trump withdrew the United States from the Trans-Pacific Partnership immediately after taking office.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact and White House archival sources.

promise_actions.title: Trump orders U.S. withdrawal from TPP
promise_actions.description: Trump signed a memorandum directing the United States to withdraw as a TPP signatory and end participation in negotiations.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The United States formally withdrew from TPP negotiations.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The United States ceased participation in the TPP framework.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: The promise is not directly Black-community-targeted but affects broader labor and economic policy debates.

source_references.source_title: Stop TPP
Presidential Memorandum Regarding Withdrawal of the United States from the Trans-Pacific Partnership Negotiations and Agreement

promise.title: Build a southern border wall and make Mexico pay
promise.promise_text: I will build a great, great wall on our southern border. And I will have Mexico pay for that wall.
promise.impacted_group: Migrants, border communities, asylum seekers, and immigration-enforcement systems
promise.summary: Trump pursued barrier construction and emergency funding strategies, but Mexico did not pay and the broader promise was not delivered as stated.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact and White House archival sources.

promise_actions.title: Trump orders border-security and wall planning
promise_actions.description: Trump signed an executive order directing new steps toward border-wall construction and enforcement expansion.

promise_actions.title: Administration uses emergency powers for wall funding
promise_actions.description: Trump declared a national emergency to redirect funds toward border barrier construction.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Barrier construction advanced in some places, but the core promise that Mexico would pay and that a comprehensive wall would be built was not met.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Some new or replacement barriers were built, but the financing and full promised scope were not achieved.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: This promise is not Black-community-specific, but it is relevant to civil-rights and immigration-policy analysis.

source_references.source_title: Build the wall, and make Mexico pay for it
Executive Order: Border Security and Immigration Enforcement Improvements

promise.title: Exit the Paris climate agreement
promise.promise_text: Trump pledged to cancel or withdraw from the Paris climate agreement.
promise.impacted_group: Communities affected by climate policy, energy regulation, and environmental health
promise.summary: Trump formally withdrew the United States from the Paris Agreement during his term.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact and State Department archival material.

promise_actions.title: Trump announces Paris withdrawal
promise_actions.description: Trump announced that the United States would withdraw from the Paris climate accord.

promise_actions.title: State Department begins formal withdrawal process
promise_actions.description: The administration formally notified the United Nations of the U.S. intent to leave the agreement.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The United States exited the Paris Agreement before later rejoining under Biden.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The United States formally left the accord during Trump's presidency.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Climate-policy reversals matter for Black communities because pollution exposure and climate harms are often unequally distributed.

source_references.source_title: Trump-O-Meter
On the U.S. Withdrawal from the Paris Agreement

promise.title: Move the U.S. embassy in Israel to Jerusalem
promise.promise_text: Trump pledged to move the U.S. embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem.
promise.impacted_group: U.S.-Israel policy stakeholders and communities affected by Middle East diplomacy
promise.summary: Trump recognized Jerusalem as Israel's capital and moved the U.S. embassy there.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from White House archival sources and PolitiFact tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: Trump recognizes Jerusalem as Israel's capital
promise_actions.description: Trump announced a major shift in U.S. policy by recognizing Jerusalem as Israel's capital.

promise_actions.title: U.S. embassy opens in Jerusalem
promise_actions.description: The U.S. embassy officially opened in Jerusalem.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The U.S. embassy was moved to Jerusalem, delivering the central promise.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Embassy operations shifted from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: This promise is not Black-community-targeted but remains relevant to foreign-policy recordkeeping.

source_references.source_title: Trump-O-Meter
Statement by President Trump on Jerusalem

promise.title: Replace NAFTA with a new trade deal
promise.promise_text: Trump promised to renegotiate NAFTA or withdraw from it.
promise.impacted_group: Workers, manufacturers, and firms affected by North American trade policy
promise.summary: Trump renegotiated NAFTA and signed the USMCA, which replaced the older agreement.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from tracker coverage and congressional records.

promise_actions.title: USMCA implementation enacted
promise_actions.description: Congress approved and Trump signed legislation implementing the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: NAFTA was replaced by USMCA.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The governing North American trade agreement changed from NAFTA to USMCA.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: This promise is not Black-community-specific, but trade policy has downstream labor and economic effects.

source_references.source_title: Trump-O-Meter
United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement Implementation Act

promise.title: Appoint conservative Supreme Court justices
promise.promise_text: Trump pledged to nominate Supreme Court justices in the mold of Antonin Scalia.
promise.impacted_group: The federal judiciary and constituencies affected by Supreme Court doctrine
promise.summary: Trump nominated and won confirmation for three Supreme Court justices, strengthening the Court's conservative bloc.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from White House archival material and tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: Trump nominates Neil Gorsuch
promise_actions.description: Trump made his first Supreme Court nomination early in his term.

promise_actions.title: Trump nominates Brett Kavanaugh
promise_actions.description: Trump selected Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court.

promise_actions.title: Trump nominates Amy Coney Barrett
promise_actions.description: Trump selected Amy Coney Barrett for the Supreme Court after Justice Ginsburg's death.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Trump delivered on the promise to appoint conservative Supreme Court justices.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Three Supreme Court seats were filled by Trump nominees.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Court appointments can shape civil-rights, voting-rights, criminal-justice, and affirmative-action outcomes affecting Black communities.

source_references.source_title: Trump-O-Meter
President Donald J. Trump Announces His Nominee for the United States Supreme Court

promise.title: Repeal and replace the Affordable Care Act
promise.promise_text: Trump repeatedly pledged to repeal and replace Obamacare.
promise.impacted_group: People insured through ACA marketplaces and Medicaid expansion, and households affected by federal health-policy changes
promise.summary: Trump and congressional Republicans tried to repeal the ACA, but the law remained in place despite several administrative changes.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from tracker coverage and congressional records.

promise_actions.title: House passes ACA repeal legislation
promise_actions.description: The House approved a repeal-and-replace measure, but the effort later failed in the Senate.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The Affordable Care Act was not repealed, though some regulatory and tax changes weakened parts of the law.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: No full ACA repeal became law.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: ACA repeal efforts had significant implications for Black health coverage and access to care.

source_references.source_title: Trump-O-Meter
American Health Care Act of 2017

promise.title: Impose a travel ban on targeted countries
promise.promise_text: Trump called for a total and complete shutdown of Muslims entering the United States and later pursued country-based travel restrictions.
promise.impacted_group: Immigrants, travelers, refugees, Muslim communities, and families affected by entry restrictions
promise.summary: Trump pursued several travel-ban orders. Courts narrowed the policy path, and the final restrictions were country-based rather than a full ban matching the original rhetoric.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from tracker coverage and White House archival material.

promise_actions.title: Trump issues first travel-ban order
promise_actions.description: Trump signed an executive order restricting entry from several countries, triggering immediate litigation and revisions.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: A narrower set of country-based travel bans took effect after legal challenges, but the original campaign wording was not implemented as stated.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Federal entry restrictions were imposed on travelers from a set of targeted countries.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: The promise is not specifically Black-community-targeted, but it affects civil-rights and immigration records relevant to communities of color, including Black Muslim and African immigrant communities.

source_references.source_title: Trump-O-Meter
Executive Order Protecting the Nation from Foreign Terrorist Entry into the United States

promise.title: Deliver a major federal tax cut
promise.promise_text: Trump campaigned on major tax cuts for individuals and businesses.
promise.impacted_group: Businesses, taxpayers, and households affected by federal tax law changes
promise.summary: Trump signed a sweeping tax law that cut the corporate tax rate and changed individual tax rules.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from congressional records and tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act signed
promise_actions.description: Trump signed the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, delivering a large change to federal tax law.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Trump delivered a large tax cut package centered on corporate-rate reduction and broad tax changes.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The corporate tax rate was cut and individual tax rules were revised.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: The promise is not specifically Black-community-focused, but tax-policy effects have downstream distributional consequences.

source_references.source_title: Trump-O-Meter
Tax Cuts and Jobs Act

promise.title: Pass federal criminal justice reform
promise.promise_text: Trump pledged reforms including prison and sentencing changes.
promise.impacted_group: Incarcerated people, families affected by incarceration, and communities affected by sentencing policy
promise.summary: Trump signed the First Step Act, producing a notable federal criminal justice reform law.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from congressional records and tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: First Step Act signed into law
promise_actions.description: Trump signed bipartisan legislation changing federal sentencing and prison policy.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Federal sentencing and prison-policy reforms were enacted through the First Step Act.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The law changed certain sentencing rules, earned-time provisions, and prison programming policy.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Federal criminal-justice reforms matter for Black communities because Black Americans are disproportionately affected by punitive sentencing and incarceration policy.

source_references.source_title: Trump-O-Meter
Formerly Incarcerated Reenter Society Transformed Safely Transitioning Every Person Act

promise.title: Rejoin the Paris climate accord
promise.promise_text: Biden promised to rejoin the Paris Agreement on climate change.
promise.impacted_group: Communities affected by climate policy, environmental regulation, and public health burdens
promise.summary: Biden rejoined the Paris climate accord immediately after taking office.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact and White House sources.

promise_actions.title: Biden begins Paris reentry
promise_actions.description: Biden signed the formal documents beginning the process to rejoin the Paris Agreement on his first day in office.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The United States rejoined the Paris Agreement early in Biden's term.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The federal government reversed the Trump-era withdrawal and resumed formal participation.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Climate policy is relevant to Black communities because pollution and climate harms often fall unevenly on Black neighborhoods.

source_references.source_title: Rejoin the Paris climate agreement
Paris Climate Agreement

promise.title: Revoke the Keystone XL pipeline permit
promise.promise_text: Biden promised to cancel the Keystone XL pipeline.
promise.impacted_group: Communities affected by climate policy, land use, and pipeline routing
promise.summary: Biden revoked the Keystone XL permit on day one, effectively ending the project.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from White House and tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: Biden revokes Keystone XL permit
promise_actions.description: Biden rescinded the presidential permit for Keystone XL on his first day in office.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The Keystone XL project was stopped after the permit revocation.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The pipeline project lost the federal permit required to proceed.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: The promise is not specifically Black-community-targeted, but environmental and land-use policy can carry distributional effects.

source_references.source_title: Biden Promise Tracker
Executive Order on Protecting Public Health and the Environment and Restoring Science to Tackle the Climate Crisis

promise.title: Nominate the first Black woman to the Supreme Court
promise.promise_text: Biden pledged to nominate the first Black woman to the U.S. Supreme Court.
promise.impacted_group: The federal judiciary and constituencies affected by representation in national institutions
promise.summary: Biden nominated Ketanji Brown Jackson, who was confirmed as the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from White House sources and tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: Biden nominates Ketanji Brown Jackson
promise_actions.description: Biden announced Ketanji Brown Jackson as his nominee to the Supreme Court.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Jackson was confirmed and became the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The Court's membership changed through Senate confirmation of Jackson.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: The appointment had direct representational significance for Black Americans and for the visibility of Black women in national institutions.

source_references.source_title: Nominate first Black woman to U.S. Supreme Court
Remarks by President Biden on the Nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court

promise.title: Forgive public-college tuition debt for many borrowers
promise.promise_text: Biden proposed forgiving undergraduate tuition-related federal student debt from public colleges and universities for borrowers earning up to $125,000.
promise.impacted_group: Student-loan borrowers, especially younger adults and households with debt burdens
promise.summary: Biden pursued broad debt relief and delivered targeted cancellation, but the Supreme Court blocked the central mass-forgiveness plan and the original campaign promise was not fully realized.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from PolitiFact, White House, and legal reporting.

promise_actions.title: Biden announces broad student debt relief plan
promise_actions.description: The administration announced a plan to cancel up to $10,000 in debt for many borrowers and more for Pell Grant recipients.

promise_actions.title: Supreme Court blocks central debt-relief plan
promise_actions.description: The Supreme Court struck down the administration's broad student loan forgiveness plan.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Biden delivered substantial targeted debt relief, but the original broad promise was only partially achieved after the Supreme Court blocked the administration's main plan.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Millions of borrowers received some forms of relief, but the broader mass-cancellation plan did not survive judicial review.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Student debt burdens have especially important equity implications for Black borrowers, who on average carry heavier student debt loads and slower repayment trajectories.

source_references.source_title: Forgive student loan debt from public colleges and universities
Fact Sheet: President Biden Announces Student Loan Relief for Borrowers Who Need It Most
Supreme Court strikes down Biden student loan forgiveness program

promise.title: Advance racial equity across the federal government
promise.promise_text: Biden pledged to advance racial equity and address barriers facing underserved communities.
promise.impacted_group: Black communities and other underserved groups affected by federal program design and delivery
promise.summary: Biden created a government-wide racial-equity framework, but implementation varied across agencies and did not produce a single durable statutory result.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from White House and tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: Biden signs executive order on advancing racial equity
promise_actions.description: The order directed federal agencies to review barriers for underserved communities and integrate equity into federal administration.

promise_actions.title: Agencies begin equity assessments and plans
promise_actions.description: Departments and agencies developed reviews, plans, and implementation processes under the order.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The administration established a federal equity framework, but implementation remained uneven and administratively vulnerable.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Agencies completed equity assessments and planning work rather than producing a single legislative change.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: The promise is directly relevant to Black communities because it sought to identify and reduce structural barriers in federal programs.

source_references.source_title: Biden Promise Tracker
Executive Order on Advancing Racial Equity and Support for Underserved Communities Through the Federal Government

promise.title: Pass a bipartisan infrastructure package
promise.promise_text: Biden campaigned on major infrastructure investment.
promise.impacted_group: Communities affected by transportation, broadband, water, and public works investment
promise.summary: Biden signed a major bipartisan infrastructure law delivering large federal investment in transportation, broadband, and public works.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from White House and congressional records.

promise_actions.title: Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act signed
promise_actions.description: Biden signed the bipartisan infrastructure package into law.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The administration delivered a major infrastructure law with long-term federal spending commitments.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Large-scale federal infrastructure funding was enacted across multiple sectors.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Infrastructure investments can have equity implications for Black communities through transit access, water quality, broadband access, and neighborhood investment.

source_references.source_title: Biden Promise Tracker
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act
Remarks by President Biden at Signing of H.R. 3684, the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act

promise.title: Reverse the ban on transgender military service
promise.promise_text: Biden pledged to allow transgender Americans to serve openly in the military.
promise.impacted_group: Transgender service members and military families
promise.summary: Biden revoked the Trump-era transgender military service restrictions and restored open service.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from White House material and tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: Biden restores transgender military service
promise_actions.description: Biden signed an order allowing all qualified Americans, including transgender Americans, to serve in uniform.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Transgender Americans regained the ability to serve openly in the military.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Federal military service rules were revised to lift the prior ban framework.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: This promise is not specifically Black-community-targeted but is relevant to civil-rights and equal-treatment policy.

source_references.source_title: Biden Promise Tracker
Executive Order on Enabling All Qualified Americans to Serve Their Country in Uniform

promise.title: Deliver 100 million COVID-19 vaccine shots in the first 100 days
promise.promise_text: Biden pledged to administer 100 million vaccine shots in his first 100 days in office.
promise.impacted_group: The general public, with high relevance for communities facing elevated COVID risk
promise.summary: Biden met the 100 million shots goal and later doubled it to 200 million within the same 100-day period.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from White House material and tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: Biden announces 200 million shot goal after meeting first target
promise_actions.description: The White House said the administration had hit the original vaccination benchmark and raised the goal.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: The administration met and then exceeded the original 100 million shot target within the first 100 days.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Vaccination benchmarks were reached ahead of the higher revised target.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Rapid vaccination delivery had major implications for Black communities, which faced disproportionate COVID exposure, mortality, and care-access burdens.

source_references.source_title: Biden Promise Tracker
Fact Sheet: President Biden Announces Historic 200 Million Shot Goal in the First 100 Days

promise.title: Raise the federal minimum wage to $15
promise.promise_text: Biden promised to raise the federal minimum wage to $15 per hour.
promise.impacted_group: Low-wage workers and households dependent on wage income
promise.summary: Biden supported a $15 federal minimum wage, but Congress did not enact it.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from tracker coverage and congressional records.

promise_actions.title: Raise the Wage Act reintroduced in the new Congress
promise_actions.description: Congressional Democrats pursued a $15 minimum wage through legislation and budget-package negotiations, but the effort fell short.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: No federal $15 minimum wage was enacted during Biden's term.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: The federal minimum wage remained below the promised $15 level.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Federal wage policy matters significantly for Black workers, who are overrepresented in many lower-paid sectors and service occupations.

source_references.source_title: Biden Promise Tracker
Raise the Wage Act of 2021

promise.title: Strengthen federal labor protections
promise.promise_text: Biden campaigned as the most pro-union president and promised stronger labor protections.
promise.impacted_group: Union workers, organizing workers, and employees affected by labor-board policy
promise.summary: Biden shifted labor policy through appointments and executive support, but large statutory reforms such as the PRO Act did not pass.
promise.notes: Research import batch 1. Built from White House statements and tracker coverage.

promise_actions.title: Biden publicly supports worker organizing in Bessemer
promise_actions.description: Biden issued a public statement supporting workers' freedom to organize without intimidation.

promise_actions.title: Biden names labor-friendly NLRB leadership
promise_actions.description: The administration reshaped labor policy through appointments and labor-board direction.

promise_outcomes.outcome_summary: Federal labor policy moved in a more worker-friendly direction administratively, but major legislative reform did not become law.
promise_outcomes.measurable_impact: Agency leadership and labor-board decisions changed, but the central statutory labor agenda stalled.
promise_outcomes.black_community_impact_note: Labor protections can be especially important for Black workers facing wage inequality, workplace vulnerability, and lower bargaining power.

source_references.source_title: Biden Promise Tracker
Statement by President Joe Biden on Amazon Workers in Bessemer, Alabama
